rationale: Educ. Code §39.0535 concerns a performance indicators study by the commissioner of education. It contains no provisions related to property tax, homestead exemptions, or appraised value thresholds under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner shall enter into a memorandum of understanding with an institution of higher education to conduct a study regarding methods to diversify the performance standards required for domains and indicators of achievement adopted under this subchapter
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to homestead exemptions or property tax; no conflict identified.
